title: Creamy French Russet Potato Stir-fry
description: A fresh and light vegan-friendly meal for kids featuring russet potatoes, prepared with a quick deglazing process.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons olive oil
ingredients.notes: or any preferred oil for cooking

ingredients.name: 1 red bell pepper, diced
ingredients.notes: optional for added color and flavor

ingredients.name: Juice of 1 lemon
ingredients.notes: for zest and acidity to enhance the creamy texture

instructions: Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C). Wash potatoes thoroughly, then slice them into thin rounds.
Place potato slices in a single layer on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with salt.
Bake for about 15 minutes or until golden brown and crispy. Remove from oven, set aside to cool slightly.
In a small pot, add the lemon juice and garlic. Sauté for 2-3 minutes over medium heat until fragrant. Be cautious as it may sizzle violently.
While cooking the potato slices, use the remaining olive oil in another pan over medium-high heat. Add diced red bell pepper (if using) and sauté for about 5 minutes or until softened.
Once the lemon garlic mixture is ready, deglaze the pan with it, scraping all the flavorful bits from the bottom of the pot into the skillet with vegetables.
Add the cooked potato slices to the skillet. Toss gently until coated with the sauce. Adjust seasoning with more salt if needed and serve hot.
